images.caption:
A little manifestation! 🏆🔥

#walmartcreator #forbescreatorupfronts #mensstyle

A little manifestation! 🏆🔥

#walmartcreator #forbescreatorupfronts #mensstyle

A conversation about authenticity.

Honored to represent Walmart at the 40th Annual Conference of the 100 Black Men of America and contribute to a discussion on identity, leadership, and the impact of the digital world.

One takeaway: authenticity isn’t about sharing everything. It’s about making sure the person the world sees is rooted in the person you actually are.

Grateful for the invitation and the opportunity to be part of the conversation.

Turns out, being yourself is still one of the most underrated leadership skills. 

Special thanks to @regine.moore @the1solesearcher 

#40yearsofimpact #100blackmen #mrqfears #walmart #blackexecellence

There’s a lot that goes into a moment like @walmart Pop Up. 

Grateful to be part of the team shaping how it all comes to life… and even more grateful to see that work acknowledged.

Thank You @brandonmaxwell 

Pop Up: 210 Lafayette st., NYC 
Now - May 10th 

 #VisualMerchandising #FashionStyling #RetailExperience #mrqfears

Shout out to @devdmoore for giving me love and showcasing my fit on his style blog during the Walmart Pop Up. 

The magic of personal style is always in the mix of brands you love @aimeleondore @walmartstyle @doublerl @rthshop @axelarigato 

#streetstyle #mrqfears #personalstyle #menstyle

Most people think they need more clothes.

They don’t.

They need a better understanding of the clothes they already own.

The difference between “I have nothing to wear” and “I love this outfit” is often just one item.

A jacket.
A hat.
A bag.
A pair of shoes.

Same closet.
Different story.

#StyleTips #MensStyle #FashionAdvice #PersonalStyle #outfitideas

Not outfit changes. Character development.

The Creative Director Vibe. 
The Off-Duty Vibe. 
The Gala Vibe. 

Different edit. 
Same person. 👽

#mensstreetstyle #inspiration #ootd #mrqfears #fashionstylist

Work week fits: Same person. Different frequencies. 👽
 
#WorkWeekFits #PersonalStyle #mrqfears #MenswearDaily #FashionLife

Sometimes making room in your closet is the first step to making room in your life. A Closet Cleanse can be a Soul Cleanse!! 🧼🫧🥰👌🏾

#PersonalStyle #StyleTips #ClosetCleanse #MensStyle #mrqfears

I didn’t choose the blazer.

The blazer chose me.

Some pieces don’t just fit.
They resonate. 👽

#MensStyle #MensFashion #StyleTips #PersonalStyle #FashionStylist

Color blocking pairs two or more distinct colors for contrast and harmony. Start with blue and orange, purple and yellow, or green and red. 💙🧡 #fashiontips  #styleadvice #summerstyle #mrqfear #colorblocking

Everyone’s wearing a World Cup jersey this summer. The difference is what you wear with it.

A few simple styling changes can take a jersey from game day to genuinely fashion forward.

Which look are you wearing?

#WorldCupStyle #MensStyle #WomensStyle #mrqfears  #StyleTips

People think style is about outfits.

I think it’s about possibilities.

Every piece in your closet has more than one life.
The question is whether you’re willing to see it differently.

Dress with intention.

#PersonalStyle #FashionStylist #StyleTips #MensFashion #mrqfears
